name: industrial_policy_classroom_monitoring_lumen_ind_col
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: industrial policy classroom monitoring lumen ind col. The moral tension is explicitly framed as individual versus collective: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A whistleblower tip has reached a reporter; silence reads as cover-up, while a rushed statement reads as recklessness. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Noah Reed
agents.identity: I am Noah Reed, the accountable decision-maker on this Industrial Policy bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes collective whenever someone invokes individual.

agents.name: Luc Haddad
agents.identity: I am Luc Haddad, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so collective is not sacrificed by default just because individual feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect collective.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Noah Reed must decide under individual versus collective. What does Noah Reed do?
